class: Phase-0 class (Poseidon-preimage shape), ~15x smaller than the 37,616-constraint spend circuit

verifier.note: Same Nethermind groth16 verifier CODE as the spend verifier, re-deployed with the receipt circuit's VK embedded (4 public inputs / 5 IC points). verify_bytes is generic over public-input count, so the code is unchanged; a new deployment is required only because the embedded VK is circuit-specific.

dev_setup: DEV-ONLY snarkjs groth16 over pot16 ptau, throwaway entropy. Not a real ceremony.

real_receipt.underlying_spend_tx: c5341c3f425d (real spend on a throwaway pool/asp pair used only to mint the test SpendEvent)

negative_tests.no_secret_non_payer: witness generation FAILS (nullifier mismatch assert) — a non-payer cannot produce a receipt
negative_tests.wrong_recipient_SECURITY_CORE: the R-bound proof presented with R' is REJECTED on-chain (Error(Contract,#0) InvalidProof) — recipient binding is load-bearing; receipts are NOT bearer-replayable
negative_tests.wrong_amount: witness generation FAILS (amount is folded into commitment->nullifier; a wrong amount can't reproduce the nullifier)
negative_tests.wrong_merchant: the proof presented with a different merchant is REJECTED on-chain (every public input is Groth16-bound)
